name: csv-filter-by-column
goal: Read the CSV file at sales.csv (columns: id, region, amount). Write a new CSV at sales_high.csv containing only the rows where amount is strictly greater than 100. Preserve the original column order and the header row.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 CSV filtering. Reuses the sales.csv fixture from csv-to-json. Stresses comparison + write-back of a filtered subset, preserving header structure.
